evals.prompt: use the roadmap skill in status mode to summarize the current roadmap state
evals.expected_output: Structured summary with progress metrics and roadmap items

assertions.name: roadmap_items_referenced
assertions.check: output mentions roadmap items from ROADMAP.md (init command, config validation, plugin system)

assertions.name: status_indicators
assertions.check: output contains progress metrics, counts, or completion status

assertions.name: structured_format
assertions.check: output uses tables or organized sections for the summary

assertions.name: context_respected
assertions.check: output does not recommend items violating CONTEXT.md boundaries (no GUI, no cloud hosting)

evals.prompt: use the roadmap skill to show help

assertions.name: modes_listed
assertions.check: output lists sync, generate, brainstorm, status, and help modes

assertions.name: labels_documented
assertions.check: output references roadmap/* and effort/* labels
